rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 score and reach the same conclusion for the same reasons: strong general engineering and tooling background, but missing the role's required deep JVM/Java/Kotlin and enterprise framework (Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate) expertise. The differences are purely cosmetic rewording (e.g., 'software craftsman' vs 'Staff/Senior software engineer', reordered strengths) and fall within ordinary run-to-run variation. No score change, new concern, or shifted reasoning keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez.
